Interface IStretchFunctionArguments

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control stretch function arguments.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("3E5A8CA3-6A10-4A3E-A49B-BBC4C86E23FE")]
public interface IStretchFunctionArguments

Properties

Gamma

The list of Gamma value(s).

IDoubleArray Gamma { get; set; }

Property Value

IDoubleArray

IArray Histograms { get; set; }

double

NumberOfStandardDeviations

double NumberOfStandardDeviations { get; set; }
